ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Only the US Army CECOM FMS team can place delivery orders against this contract.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W91CRB16D5006 (P00006) awarded to HARRIS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE DODAAC FROM CG0TKC TO CG0UTP, THIS WILL ALLOW HARRIS CORPORATION TO SHIP ITEMS IN PLACE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
